name: CytoMed Therapeutics Limited Ordinary Shares
summary: CytoMed Therapeutics Limited is a Singapore-based biotechnology company focused on developing novel cell-based immunotherapies for the treatment of cancers. The company's lead product candidate is CTM-GDT1, an allogeneic gamma delta T-cell therapy for the treatment of various cancers. CytoMed Therapeutics Limited is headquartered in Singapore.
